Package org.eventb.internal.ui.eventbeditor

Class EventBTreeLabelProvider

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.internal.ui.eventbeditor.EventBTreeLabelProvider
All Implemented Interfaces:
EventListener, org.eclipse.core.resources.IResourceChangeListener, org.eclipse.jface.util.IPropertyChangeListener, org.eclipse.jface.viewers.IBaseLabelProvider, org.eclipse.jface.viewers.ITableColorProvider, org.eclipse.jface.viewers.ITableFontProvider, org.eclipse.jface.viewers.ITableLabelProvider
public class EventBTreeLabelProvider extends Object implements org.eclipse.jface.viewers.ITableLabelProvider, org.eclipse.jface.viewers.ITableFontProvider, org.eclipse.jface.viewers.ITableColorProvider, org.eclipse.jface.util.IPropertyChangeListener, org.eclipse.core.resources.IResourceChangeListener
